name: dispersed_repeat_ltr
description: Endogenous retroviruses (HERVs) and solo LTRs: human-genome-resident retroviral remnants. Full proviruses (~6-11 kb) consist of two flanking LTRs (250-1400 bp each) bracketing gag/pol/env. ~8% of the human genome. Families HERV-K (youngest, HML-2 still capable of forming viral particles), HERV-H, HERV-W (the latter encodes syncytin-1 for placentation), HERV-L. Most internal coding is decayed; solo LTRs from homologous recombination are far more common than intact proviruses.
